text.message: Chill out dice give us a chance lol
I needed a card otherwise I couldn’t do anything
So you have to start playing your dev cards
You really take your loss prematurely
Oj how did you get in this ranked game. Everyone is top 200 current global and you’re unranked
Lol I have no idea. I play every once in awhile for fun
Ain’t no way I’ve played that bad
Blue road and army and win next turn
I can take road with some help
